name: devcynx (dark + neon Odoo agency theme)
description: Dark-mode developer-agency theme for an Odoo consultancy. Near-black canvas (#0a0a0f) + neon lime accent (#84cc16) + subtle violet highlights. JetBrains Mono for code, Inter for body. 15 reusable sections matching the way4tech.com long-tail structure but with a developer-tools aesthetic: mega-menu header, gradient + grid hero, glowing card grids, dynamic ContactForm, multi-column footer.

extra_tokens.gradient_glow: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 30%, rgba(132,204,22,0.18) 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 70%, rgba(167,139,250,0.12) 0%, transparent 50%)
